sourceTitle: IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES Official Product Page and Technical Manual
sourceNote: 請以品牌官方技術手冊、產品 leaflet、教育手冊或官方色卡為準。若資料來自經銷商、部落格或非官方影片，verified 必須為 false 或 partial。
notes: Verified sub-line seed for IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES. Official page states 1:1 mixing, 9% developer, 30-45 minute development and up to 100% white hair coverage; it also notes 6% for pure color deposit on more than 90% white hair.

conditions: IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES permanent color service for mature hair coverage.
warnings: For pure color deposit on more than 90% white hair, use 6% / 20 vol as official notes indicate.

conditions: Regrowth retouch with IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES where coverage support is needed.
warnings: Avoid unnecessary overlap on previously colored porous lengths.

conditions: White hair coverage service with IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES.
warnings: Heat is not needed or recommended for white coverage according to official FAQ.

recommendedUse: pure color deposit on more than 90% white hair
restrictions: Use where official instructions call for deposit-focused coverage.
Assess scalp sensitivity and hair integrity before use.
